question: Is the canvas strictly divided horizontally into an upper section (approx. 55% height) and a lower section (approx. 45% height)?
Does the upper-left section contain exactly 6 small bar charts arranged in a 3-row × 2-column matrix?
Do all small bar charts in the upper-left section contain exactly 3 vertical bars labeled A, B, and C?
Does the first small bar chart (top-left) show a strictly ascending height pattern (20 < 40 < 60)?
Does the second small bar chart (top-right) show a strictly descending height pattern (60 > 40 > 20)?
Does the fifth small bar chart (bottom-left) show bars A and B as equal height and taller than bar C (70 = 70 > 20)?
Does the upper-right section contain a single large line chart with exactly 3 lines labeled L1, L2, and L3?
Are the data points on lines L1, L2, and L3 marked with hollow circles, with approximately 8 points per line?
In the line chart, does Line L1 trend upward (10→80) and Line L2 trend downward (80→10)?
In the line chart, does Line L3 show an arching trend (rising then falling)?
Does the large line chart contain exactly 4 light gray horizontal grid lines?
Does the lower-left section contain a ring chart (donut chart) with exactly 5 sectors?
Are there leader lines connecting the ring chart sectors to labels S1 through S5 outside the ring?
In the ring chart, is the largest sector (representing 135°) visually significantly larger than the smallest sector (representing 30°)?
Does the lower-right section contain a table structure with 4 rows and 3 columns?
Does the table contain headers H1-H3 in the first row and row labels R1-R3 in the first column?
Are the data cells in the table filled with alternating solid circle (●) and hollow circle (○) symbols, starting with ●?
Are all module boundaries marked with thin rectangular frames?
Does the image strictly use only black, gray, and blue colors (excluding the white background)?
Are all text labels (A/B/C, L1-L3, S1-S5, H1-H3, R1-R3) clearly legible and composed only of Latin characters?
Are the grid lines, axes, and module boundary frames straight and clear, without breaks or warping?
Is the image free of obvious artifacts, unnatural visual noise, or severe distortion?
